body.title: Add cost-to-close metric to every ticket
body.result: cost_usd stored on ticket at close; shown in list/show output; 15 tests green
body.intention: I intend that every closed ticket carries a dollar cost so Akien can see inference spend per ticket at a glance.
body.description:
Track and display the total inference cost (in USD) incurred to close each ticket. The value comes from sprint_tokens.log (which already records model/tokens per turn) — we compute cost at close time and store it on the ticket row. Surface it in cc_queue.py list output alongside size/priority.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, possibly sprint_tokens.log schema or a new costs-per-ticket index
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; observability-first
**Scope boundary:** IN: store cost_usd on ticket at close; show in list/show output. OUT: retroactive cost computation for already-closed tickets, budget gating, alerting.
**Completion criteria:** `cc_queue.py list` shows cost_usd on closed tickets (e.g. '$0.83'); `cc_queue.py show T-xxx` includes cost_usd field; column is NULL for tickets closed before this ships (not backfilled).
